task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler exists or is being edited with the exact title 'IncidentResponse'.
The tag pill 'Runbook' is visible in the tags section of the 'IncidentResponse' tiddler.

task_completion.description: Write a brief overview paragraph describing the runbook (at least 20 words) in the body
task_completion.visual_evidence: The body text area contains a coherent paragraph of text that appears to be at least 20 words long, describing the incident response runbook.

task_completion.description: Include the <<list-links>> macro in the body of the tiddler
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '<<list-links>>' (or similar valid macro syntax) is visible in the body editor after the overview paragraph, or a rendered list of links is visible in the view mode below the paragraph.

task_completion.description: Add a 'list' field to order the 6 procedure tiddlers in the exact required sequence
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the tiddler editor's custom fields section, a field named 'list' exists with the 6 procedures in double brackets in this exact order: [[Incident Detection and Alerting]] [[Initial Triage and Assessment]] [[Communication and Escalation]] [[Containment and Mitigation]] [[Recovery and Restoration]] [[Post-Incident Review]]. Alternatively, the rendered view shows the 6 links in this exact order.

integrity.description: The agent used the TiddlyWiki web interface to create and edit the tiddler
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the TiddlyWiki web UI in a browser, with the tiddler editor open, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent wrote a genuine overview paragraph rather than just pasting the prompt text
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the body is a coherent paragraph describing an incident response runbook, not just a copy-paste of the task description instructions.

integrity.description: The agent actually used the 'list' field to order the tiddlers, rather than hardcoding a bulleted list in the body
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'list' field is visible in the tiddler editor's custom fields section, or the rendered view clearly uses the <<list-links>> macro rather than manually typed bullet points.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected tiddler title is 'IncidentResponse'. It must have the tag 'Runbook'. The body must contain at least 20 words of overview text followed by the <<list-links>> macro. The 'list' field must contain exactly these items in this order: [[Incident Detection and Alerting]] [[Initial Triage and Assessment]] [[Communication and Escalation]] [[Containment and Mitigation]] [[Recovery and Restoration]] [[Post-Incident Review]].
